verses.text: The LORD who 'formeth the spirit of man within him' will make Jerusalem 'a cup of trembling' and 'a burdensome stone' to all peoples. Immovable city. Those who lift against God's city are crushed by it.

The LORD who 'formeth the spirit of man within him' will make Jerusalem 'a cup of trembling' and 'a burdensome stone' to all peoples. Immovable city. Those who lift against God's city are crushed by it.

The LORD who 'formeth the spirit of man within him' will make Jerusalem 'a cup of trembling' and 'a burdensome stone' to all peoples. Immovable city. Those who lift against God's city are crushed by it.

He will smite the enemy's horses with astonishment, and Judah's governors shall own, 'the inhabitants of Jerusalem... are my strength in the LORD.' Strength in God. The people's might is found in the LORD alone.

He will smite the enemy's horses with astonishment, and Judah's governors shall own, 'the inhabitants of Jerusalem... are my strength in the LORD.' Strength in God. The people's might is found in the LORD alone.
He will make Judah 'like an hearth of fire among the wood,' and save the tents of Judah first. Lowly first. God honours the humble before the proud.
He will make Judah 'like an hearth of fire among the wood,' and save the tents of Judah first. Lowly first. God honours the humble before the proud.
He will defend Jerusalem; 'he that is feeble... shall be as David'; He will destroy the nations that come against her. Weak made mighty. God's defence makes the frailest a champion.
He will defend Jerusalem; 'he that is feeble... shall be as David'; He will destroy the nations that come against her. Weak made mighty. God's defence makes the frailest a champion.

He will pour 'the spirit of grace and of supplications'; 'they shall look upon me whom they have pierced,' and mourn as for an only son. The pierced One. They shall behold the crucified Christ and weep in true repentance.

He will pour 'the spirit of grace and of supplications'; 'they shall look upon me whom they have pierced,' and mourn as for an only son. The pierced One. They shall behold the crucified Christ and weep in true repentance.
The land shall mourn, each family apart, with their wives apart — David, Nathan, Levi, Shimei, and all. Deep mourning. Genuine grief for sin is personal and heartfelt.
